body.label: Input Output Engineering Core Development Proposal (5of6)
description: Plutus Date Changes: The proposed adjustments specify new comple
tion dates for each of the milestones MS14.6 & MS14.9 of Plutus
Core Project. These revisions are a direct and necessary consequ
ence of unforeseen technical and external constraints.Tiered Pri
cing Milestone Cancellations: IOE recommend the cancellation of
this workstream and its associated milestones. The rationale is
detailed below, and outcome of this cancellation is to release f
unding from relevant Smart Contract and back to the Treasury.
reason: This Change Request Form is being submitted to align the referen
ced milestones and completion dates with the revised technical r
ealities identified during the current phase of the project. The
need for this revision is based on new and previously undiscove
red technical data/requirements identified during the execution

of the Scope of Work (“SOW”).
Primary drivers for these changes

across all the listed initiatives are:
-Development complexiti
es identified: Identification of previously unknown or undiscove
rable technical requirements necessitating additional developmen

t work to meet deliverables and acceptance criteria.
-Infrastru
cture constraint and/or dependency delay specifically new Ledger

era.
For the Tiered Pricing Mechanism (MS15.1 - MS15.5) workst
ream specifically, IOE have identified that the research this pr
oposal implementation was based upon does not fully reflect futu
re releases, specifically in regards to the Leios implementation
. As a result, do not believe that continuing this work would de
liver the value anticipated to the ecosystem and propose to canc
el milestones associated, releasing those funds back to the Trea

description: MS14.4 - Plutus Core: CIP-0153: builtin value Deliverables: The
built-in value type, and primitives for operating on values
MS14.6 - Plutus Core: CIP-0112: Observe script type Deliverable
s: A new script purpose - Observe, for Plutus V4
details: Changing milestone payment date from 2026-01-30 to 2026-07-30

description: MS14.9 - Plutus Core: Introduce Plutus V4 as a new Plutus ledger
language version Deliverables: Plutus V4
details: Changing milestone payment date from 2026-04-30 to 2026-07-30

description: MS14.10 - Plutus Core: Plinth (Plutus Tx) compiler and library e
nhancement  Deliverables: (1) support inlining for recursive bi
ndings; (2) implement new compiler optimizations targeting new l
anguage extensions (3) make the new (data-based) API more compre
hensive and efficient
MS14.11 - Plutus Core: Plinth (Plutus Tx) developer tooling enha
ncement Deliverables: (1) Remove the requirement of using Nix f
or setup (2) Support at least two major GHC versions (3) Make th
e UPLC executable easier to use
MS14.12 - Plutus Core: Plutus language performance benchmark  D
eliverables: Develop a benchmark comparing the performance of va
rious surface languages targeting UPLC, such as Plinth, Aiken, p
lu-ts and Plutarch.
MS14.13 - Plutus Core: Plinth (Plutus Tx) compiler certifier: in
itial release Deliverables: Initial release of the certifier fo
cusing on certifying UPLC optimizations
MS16.1 - Transaction Monitoring System: State-of-the-art report
Deliverables: Report on fraud and anomaly detection. Specificat
ion of the Backend analysis
MS16.2 - Transaction Monitoring System: Alpha version of the bac
kend Deliverables: Release in the open source repository. Live
version on a selection of Dapps or wallets on a testnet with a r
ough UI
MS16.3 - Transaction Monitoring System: Frontend for data visual
ization and alert mechanism Deliverables: Code available in the
open source repository. Website with the new Front end visualiz
ation. Roadmap for future integration
